reviews.comment:
Un lugar con todos los servicios! Prolijo, limpio, con juegos para niños,parquizado, sin duda la mejor parada en ruta 2

(Translated by Google)
A place with all the amenities! Neat, clean, with a children's playground, landscaped, without a doubt the best stop on Route 2
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNMGRUckdBEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre que viajo trato de hacer una parada ahí ya que,tienen todos los servicios,los baños limpios y un buen parque para que mi perrita juegue.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I travel I try to make a stop there because they have all the services, clean bathrooms and a good park for my dog ​​to play in.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNa2RLN3ZnRRAB

It seems nice, good service, just fill up with fuel.

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno para parar a tomar mate y comer algo. Llevarse para comer porque te matan con los precios.

(Translated by Google)
Great place to stop for mate and a bite to eat. Bring your own food because the prices are outrageous.
